title: Trepidation Craft
description: Trpidation Craft a Vanilla+ or better said "Minecraft 2" Zombie survival experiance with optimized performance and mod compatibility

 тАО тАО тАО

Trepidation Craft is a zombie survival experience heavily inspired by Deceased Craft, but with a distinct approach. While Descented Craft fundamentally alters the core essence of Minecraft, Trapidation Craft remains true to the vanilla experience and expands upon it with carefully selected mods and features giving you a vanilla+ / Minecraft gameplay.

**Notice: Trepidation Craft does NOT have an official server.** You can find a list of public servers on our website or in the community Discord, and add them to the multiplayer menu. Alternatively, you can buy your own server from Bisect Hosting

![Devider](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/06ff2f69343f35978b85f6a6cc30b0f0560d2e9f.png) 
### тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО  тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО тАО  тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАО тАО  тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО  тАО тАО тАОтАО тАО тАО тАОтАОтАОтАОтАО тАОтАО _**Trepidation Craft Features**_
 тАО тАО тАО
- **Vanilla+ Experience:** We keep the core essence of Minecraft intact, ensuring a familiar gameplay experience.

- **Zombie Survival Elements:** Introduces zombie survival mechanics, adding a new layer of challenge and excitement.

- **Mod Integration:** Utilizes a variety of mods to enhance gameplay overhauling the vanilla mechanics but not completly changing them.

- **Storyline and Quests:** The storyline and quests to defeat The End remain largely unchanged, with adjustments that fit seamlessly into the vanilla+ concept.

- **Progression System:** Players must use all available mods to improve their gear, ensuring a sense of progression and accomplishment.

- **Scaling Difficulty:** As difficulty increases, players need better equipment to survive, keeping the game engaging and challenging.

- **Performance Optimization:** We've optimized Trapidation Craft for smooth performance by using the Performia modpack, which is designed to enhance gameplay speed and stability. This helps keep the game running fast and stable, even on lower-end computers. We've carefully configured these mods to ensure you get a great gaming experience without any lag or slowdowns.
